changes.comment: Qualifier ergonomics (F1 + F14): QualifierCollector.create accepts mixed `(string | IQualifierDecl)[]` with optional qualifierTypes when all entries are strings; SimpleContextQualifierProvider and ValidatingSimpleContextQualifierProvider widen `qualifierValues` to `Readonly<Partial<Record<string, ...>>>` to accept conditional `{ k: v } | {}` shapes.
